plugins.name: drawio-diagrams
plugins.description: Create editable draw.io (.drawio) diagrams — block/architecture diagrams, sequence diagrams, and flowcharts — programmatically, with optional PNG/SVG export.

plugins.name: aosp-module-doc
plugins.description: Generate a complete, source-grounded technical document for one AOSP module or tool (build system, release_config, aconfig, Soong, init, binder, …): 概述/整体架构/子模块/关键流程/调试工具/参考文档, with embedded draw.io diagrams, verified against current AOSP source rather than training memory. Optional standalone HTML export.
